LanguageData.DW_FireCloud.label: Fire
LanguageData.DW_Flamer_III.label: Artemia Mk III Purgation Flamer
LanguageData.DW_Flamer_III.description: Hailing from the same forge world as the mighty Hellhound flame tank, this weapon uses volatile promethium to scour heretics with fire.
LanguageData.DW_Flamer_III.tools.0.label: barrel
LanguageData.DW_Thunder_Hammer_II.label: Crucis Mk II Thunder Hammer
LanguageData.DW_Thunder_Hammer_II.description: Power weapons of ancient design, Thunder Hammers are devastating, bone-shattering close combat weapons, though heavy and unwieldy.
LanguageData.DW_Thunder_Hammer_II.tools.0.label: Hammer
LanguageData.DW_RelicBlade_II.label: Munitorum Mk II Relic Blade
LanguageData.DW_RelicBlade_II.description: This sword's advanced power core channels coursing energy through the blade with devastating effect.
LanguageData.DW_RelicBlade_II.tools.0.label: Blade
LanguageData.DW_HeavyEviscerator_XV.label: Heavy Eviscerator Mk XV
LanguageData.DW_HeavyEviscerator_XV.description: Strength alone is not enough to effectively wield an Eviscerator, but zeal and rage can compensate. As such, it has become associated with righteous fury, and is a favoured weapon of firebrand preachers.
LanguageData.DW_HeavyEviscerator_XV.tools.0.label: Edge
